race.comment: PRIDE TO FOLLOW (1) comes out of a strong rating race after she showed good early speed from an outside draw before fading to finish fourth to Wanaruah over 1100m at Scone last Saturday. Extra trip in her favour and expected to bounce back. WANDA RIVER (6) tough gelding who will find this more to his liking. Drifted back and never got into the contest when tenth to Formal Display over 1400m in the Tamworth Cup. Tricky map today and not without each-way prospects. DIS IS HEAVEN (3) was in need of the run in the heavy going when he faded in the straight to run sixth over 1000m at Eagle Farm. Yet to win past 1100m and gets his chance from a good gate in this easier contest. BJORN IRONSIDE (9) returns from let-up. Snagged back from the draw and never looked a chance when tenth over 1007m at Taree. Can race closer today and represents good each-way value.
